fields.description: The full external host the customer owns (shop.acme.com), unique across the fleet. Routed to the backend VM by SNI passthrough — the proxy holds no per-domain cert.
fields.label: Domain

fields.description: Inactive custom domains are dropped from both the :443 SNI and :80 ACME maps (the row stays for history).
fields.label: Active

fields.description: Informational. A registered domain is Active and in the :443 SNI map immediately; Failed signals a reconcile error. There is no cert step on Satellite's side.
fields.label: Status

fields.description: The site VM this custom domain forwards to. The proxy passes the raw TLS stream through to its guest IPv6 :443.
fields.label: Virtual Machine

fields.description: The target VM's routing IPv6 /128, denormalized so the desired map is a single query with no join. Kept in sync with the mirror on save.
fields.label: Address

fields.description: The caller VM's own regional site FQDN (provenance — the name a customer CNAMEs to). Blank if the VM owns no Subdomain yet.
fields.label: Site
